FeaturedGame Modes

System Requirements

Minimum

  • OSWindows 7 / 8 / 10 / 11
  • ProcessorIntel Celeron or equivalent
  • Memory2 GB RAM
  • Storage200 MB available space

Recommended

  • OSWindows 10 / 11
  • ProcessorIntel Core i3 or equivalent
  • Memory4 GB RAM
  • Storage200 MB available space

FAQ

What grade level is this for?▼
E-SIPNAYAN is designed for grade school students learning geometry concepts, specifically Area and Surface Area. The difficulty adjusts based on the player's progress.
Is the download safe?▼
Yes. All downloads are served from our official servers, Windows SmartScreen may show a warning—this is normal for software without a code signing certificate.
How do I install the game?▼
Run the .exe installer and follow the prompts. Choose your installation directory and complete the setup. Once installed, you can launch the game from the Start Menu or desktop shortcut.
The game won't start. What should I do?▼
Make sure your Windows is up to date. Try running the game as administrator. If issues persist, contact support at support@esipnayan.com.
Can I use this in a classroom?▼
Yes. E-SIPNAYAN is free for educational use. Teachers can install it on school computers for students to practice geometry concepts.
Does it work offline?▼
Yes. No internet connection is required. The game works fully offline once installed.

Ready to Play?

Download E-SIPNAYAN Games and start learning math the fun way.
